text.title: manifest-then-fetch Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the input profile satisfy preconditions (required drivers: tool_outputs_avg_bytes, store_backend, sensitivity)?

conclusion.verdict: Profile incomplete — return structured error, do not guess defaults.

branch.when: profile.valid == true AND tool_outputs_avg_bytes == 'high' or tool_outputs_avg_bytes >= upper_threshold AND store_backend == 'advanced'

conclusion.verdict: Pick the advanced/strict variant — see core rules for the precise wiring.

branch.when: profile.valid == true AND tool_outputs_avg_bytes == 'high' or tool_outputs_avg_bytes >= upper_threshold AND store_backend != 'advanced'
profile.valid == true AND tool_outputs_avg_bytes == 'low' or tool_outputs_avg_bytes < upper_threshold

conclusion.verdict: Pick the low-tier default variant — cheaper, simpler, fewer guarantees.
